item.title: Now every new CLI session or when you use /new on a gateway messenger platform, Hermes will give you...
item.description:
Now every new CLI session or when you use /new on a gateway messenger platform, Hermes will give you a tip!
`hermes update` and you're good to go! https://t.co/EDih7Dk2Z7
--- @Teknium | ❤️ 29 | 🔁 0 | 💬 4 | 👁 840
item.author: @Teknium
